phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia street food, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh DOH-veh see MAN-jah STREET (it) FOOD per fa-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua il profumo verso le bancarelle alimentari.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah EEL proh-FOO-moh VEHR-soh LEH bahn-kah-REHL-leh ah-lee-mehn-TAH-ree
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the scent towards the food stalls.

responses.english: Follow the scent towards the food stalls.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah EEL proh-FOO-moh VEHR-soh LEH bahn-kah-REHL-leh ah-lee-mehn-TAH-ree
responses.local: Segua il profumo verso le bancarelle alimentari.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee BAHN-yee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the corner bar, customers only.

responses.english: At the corner bar, customers only.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, il mercato è aperto oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eel mer-KAH-toh eh ah-PEHR-toh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove vendono il pane con la milza?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh DOH-veh VEN-doh-noh eel PAH-neh kon lah MIL-tsah

likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow stall, on the right.

responses.english: At the yellow stall, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si possono fare foto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see POS-soh-noh FAH-reh FOH-toh, per fah-VOH-reh
